STUDY SESSION
25:00
Focus
Session 1 of 4
💡 Pomodoro Technique: 25 min study → 5 min break → repeat 4x → 15 min long break. Proven to improve focus and prevent burnout during Matric exam preparation.
Formula Cheat Sheet 📐

💚 You are not alone — 100 000+ SA learners use these tools every year

Lifeline SA: 0861 322 322
Childline: 116 (free, 24hr)
SMS: 31393 (SADAG)

📋 POPIA Compliance Notice
MatricAce SA collects anonymous usage data to improve your learning experience. We do not sell your data to third parties. Ad analytics are processed by Google AdMob. Subscription data is managed by Google Play. You have the right to access, correct, or delete your data at any time. For queries contact: [email protected]
📌 Logged in anonymously • Link Google account

Cancel Premium?
We're sorry to see you go. Here's what you'll lose:
❌ Unlimited AI Study Buddy (Ace) chats
❌ Mock Exam access
❌ Download past papers
❌ No-ads experience
❌ Unlimited flashcards without ads
❌ Premium badge & profile
Current plan Monthly — R69/month
Premium active until —
You won't be charged again. Your Premium features stay active until the end of your current billing period.
💡
Graduating soon?
Consider keeping Premium through your exam period — Ace AI and Mock Exams are most valuable right before finals!

🤖 AI Buddy Cap

The daily AI question limit for your class. This applies to all AI features — AI Study Buddy and Question Generator.

—
School Max
—
Your Class Cap
🔒
The AI cap is set by the MatricAce Super Admin and cannot be changed here. Contact [email protected] to request a cap adjustment.
🔢 Student Numbers

Each student uses their Student Number to sign up on MatricAce. Share these with your students.

Loading...
How students sign up
1️⃣ Give the student their Student Number
2️⃣ Student opens MatricAce and taps Sign Up
3️⃣ Student selects 🏫 School Student
4️⃣ Student enters their student number — it verifies automatically
5️⃣ Student fills in name, email and creates a password
6️⃣ Done! They can now sign in with their student number or email

CURRENT_USER.uid : null; if (!uid) return; try { _studentMsgs = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('ma_pm_stu_' + uid) || '{}'); } catch(e) { _studentMsgs = {}; } // Fetch from Supabase if (typeof SB !== 'undefined' && SB) { SB.from('private_messages').select('*').or('to_uid.eq.' + uid + ',from_uid.eq.' + uid).order('created_at', {ascending:false}).limit(100) .then(({data}) => { if (!data) return; data.forEach(m => { const threadKey = m.from_uid === uid ? m.to_uid || 'teacher' : m.from_uid || 'teacher'; if (!_studentMsgs[threadKey]) _studentMsgs[threadKey] = []; if (!_studentMsgs[threadKey].find(x => x.id === m.id)) { _studentMsgs[threadKey].push({id:m.id, from:m.from_uid, body:m.body, ts:m.created_at, read:m.read}); } }); try { localStorage.setItem('ma_pm_stu_' + uid, JSON.stringify(_studentMsgs)); } catch(e) {} _renderStudentMsgList(); }).catch(() => {}); } _renderStudentMsgList(); } function _renderStudentMsgList() { const wrap = document.getElementById('msg-thread-list'); if (!wrap) return; const threads = Object.entries(_studentMsgs); if (!threads.length) { wrap.innerHTML = '
No messages yet.
Your teacher can send you a private message from the Teacher Dashboard.
'; return; } wrap.innerHTML = threads.map(([threadKey, msgs]) => { const last = msgs[msgs.length - 1]; const unread = msgs.filter(m => !m.read && m.from !== 'student').length; const label = threadKey === 'teacher' ? '👩‍🏫 Your Teacher' : threadKey; return `
${label} ${unread ? `${unread} new` : ''}
${last?.body?.slice(0,60) || 'No messages'}
`; }).join(''); } function openStudentMsgThread(threadKey) { _activeMsgThread = threadKey; const msgs = _studentMsgs[threadKey] || []; // Mark as read msgs.forEach(m => m.read = true); const uid = (typeof CURRENT_USER !== 'undefined' && CURRENT_USER) ? CURRENT_USER.uid : null; if (uid) try { localStorage.setItem('ma_pm_stu_' + uid, JSON.stringify(_studentMsgs)); } catch(e) {} document.getElementById('msg-convo-name').textContent = threadKey === 'teacher' ? '👩‍🏫 Your Teacher' : threadKey; const bubblesEl = document.getElementById('msg-convo-bubbles'); const uid2 = uid || 'student'; bubblesEl.innerHTML = msgs.map(m => { const sent = m.from === uid2 || m.from === 'student'; const ts = m.ts ? new Date(m.ts).toLocaleTimeString('en-ZA',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'}) : ''; return `
${m.body}
${ts}
`; }).join('') || '
No messages yet
'; bubblesEl.scrollTop = bubblesEl.scrollHeight; document.getElementById('msg-thread-list').style.display = 'none'; document.getElementById('msg-convo').style.display = 'flex'; } function closeStudentMsgConvo() { document.getElementById('msg-convo').style.display = 'none'; document.getElementById('msg-thread-list').style.display = 'flex'; _activeMsgThread = null; } async function sendStudentMsg() { const input = document.getElementById('msg-reply-input'); const body = input?.value?.trim(); if (!body || !_activeMsgThread) return; const uid = (typeof CURRENT_USER !== 'undefined' && CURRENT_USER) ? CURRENT_USER.uid : 'student'; if (!_studentMsgs[_activeMsgThread]) _studentMsgs[_activeMsgThread] = []; const msg = {id:'pm_s_'+Date.now(), from:uid, body, ts:new Date().toISOString(), read:true}; _studentMsgs[_activeMsgThread].push(msg); input.value = ''; openStudentMsgThread(_activeMsgThread); try { localStorage.setItem('ma_pm_stu_' + uid, JSON.stringify(_studentMsgs)); } catch(e) {} // Save to Supabase const supaURL = typeof SUPA_URL !== 'undefined' ? SUPA_URL : ''; const supaKey = typeof SUPA_KEY !== 'undefined' ? SUPA_KEY : ''; if (supaURL) fetch(supaURL + '/rest/v1/private_messages', {method:'POST', headers:{'apikey':supaKey,'Authorization':'Bearer '+supaKey,'Content-Type':'application/json','Prefer':'return=minimal'}, body: JSON.stringify({id:msg.id, from_uid:uid, to_uid:_activeMsgThread, body, created_at:msg.ts, read:false})}).catch(()=>{}); } // Check for new messages periodically and show badge function _checkNewMessages() { const uid = (typeof CURRENT_USER !== 'undefined' && CURRENT_USER) ? CURRENT_USER.uid : null; if (!uid || typeof SB === 'undefined' || !SB) return; SB.from('private_messages').select('id,from_uid,body,created_at').eq('to_uid', uid).eq('read', false).limit(5) .then(({data}) => { if (!data?.length) return; data.forEach(m => { const threadKey = m.from_uid || 'teacher'; if (!_studentMsgs[threadKey]) _studentMsgs[threadKey] = []; if (!_studentMsgs[threadKey].find(x => x.id === m.id)) { _studentMsgs[threadKey].push({id:m.id,from:m.from_uid,body:m.body,ts:m.created_at,read:false}); if (typeof _pushNotif === 'function') _pushNotif('message','New message from your teacher', m.body.slice(0,80)); } }); try { localStorage.setItem('ma_pm_stu_' + uid, JSON.stringify(_studentMsgs)); } catch(e) {} }).catch(()=>{}); } setInterval(_checkNewMessages, 90000); // ── Classwork / task notification polling (every 10 minutes) ── setInterval(_pollClassworkNotifs, 600000); // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // STUDENT CLASS STREAM // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function loadStudentStream() { const list = document.getElementById('student-stream-list'); if (!list) return; const sid = (typeof CURRENT_USER !== 'undefined' && CURRENT_USER) ? CURRENT_USER.school_id : null; const cid = (typeof CURRENT_USER !== 'undefined' && CURRENT_USER) ? CURRENT_USER.class_id : null; if (!sid) { list.innerHTML = '
Join a class to see the stream
'; return; } list.innerHTML = '
Loading…
'; const supaURL = typeof SUPA_URL !== 'undefined' ? SUPA_URL : ''; const supaKey = typeof SUPA_KEY !== 'undefined' ? SUPA_KEY : ''; if (!supaURL) return; const query = supaURL + '/rest/v1/class_stream?school_id=eq.' + sid + (cid?'&class_id=eq.'+cid:'') + '&order=created_at.desc&limit=40'; fetch(query, {headers:{'apikey':supaKey,'Authorization':'Bearer '+supaKey}}) .then(r => r.json()) .then(rows => { if (!rows?.length) { list.innerHTML = '
No posts yet
'; return; } const typeColors = {announce:'var(--primary)',assignment:'var(--green)',material:'#D97706',question:'#7C3AED'}; const typeLabels = {announce:'📢 Announcement',assignment:'📋 Assignment',material:'📎 Material',question:'❓ Question'}; list.innerHTML = rows.map(item => { const col = typeColors[item.type]||'var(--primary)'; const ts = item.created_at ? new Date(item.created_at).toLocaleDateString('en-ZA',{day:'2-digit',month:'short',hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'}) : ''; const comments = item.comments || []; return `
${(item.author_name||'T')[0].toUpperCase()}
${item.author_name||'Teacher'}
${ts}
${typeLabels[item.type]||item.type}
${item.body}
${item.link?`🔗 ${item.link.length>50?item.link.slice(0,50)+'…':item.link}`:''} ${comments.length ? `
${comments.length} comment${comments.length!==1?'s':''}
` : ''}
`; }).join(''); }).catch(() => { list.innerHTML = '
Could not load stream
'; }); } // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // CLASS JOIN CODE — Self enrol // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ async function joinClassByCode() { const codeEl = document.getElementById('join-code-input'); const msgEl = document.getElementById('join-code-msg'); const code = codeEl?.value?.trim().toUpperCase(); if (!code || code.length < 4) { msgEl.textContent = '❌ Enter your class code'; msgEl.style.color = 'var(--red)'; return; } const uid = (typeof CURRENT_USER !== 'undefined' && CURRENT_USER) ? CURRENT_USER.uid : null; if (!uid) { msgEl.textContent = '❌ Please log in first'; msgEl.style.color = 'var(--red)'; return; } msgEl.textContent = '🔍 Looking up code…'; msgEl.style.color = 'var(--text3)'; const supaURL = typeof SUPA_URL !== 'undefined' ? SUPA_URL : ''; const supaKey = typeof SUPA_KEY !== 'undefined' ? SUPA_KEY : ''; try { const r = await fetch(supaURL + '/rest/v1/class_codes?code=eq.' + encodeURIComponent(code) + '&select=*&limit=1', {headers:{'apikey':supaKey,'Authorization':'Bearer '+supaKey}}); const rows = await r.json(); if (!rows?.length) { msgEl.textContent = '❌ Code not found — check with your teacher'; msgEl.style.color = 'var(--red)'; return; } const row = rows[0]; // Add student to class const stuName = CURRENT_USER.name + (CURRENT_USER.surname ? ' ' + CURRENT_USER.surname : ''); const stuData = {id:'stu_'+Date.now(), user_id:uid, full_username:stuName, display_name:stuName, class_id:row.class_id, school_id:row.school_id, join_method:'code', created_at:new Date().toISOString()}; const res2 = await fetch(supaURL + '/rest/v1/school_students', {method:'POST', headers:{'apikey':supaKey,'Authorization':'Bearer '+supaKey,'Content-Type':'application/json','Prefer':'return=representation'}, body:JSON.stringify(stuData)}); if (res2.ok) { // Update local user context CURRENT_USER.class_id = row.class_id; CURRENT_USER.school_id = row.school_id; try { let users = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('matric_ace_users')||'{}'); if (users[uid]) { users[uid].class_id = row.class_id; users[uid].school_id = row.school_id; } localStorage.setItem('matric_ace_users', JSON.stringify(users)); } catch(e) {} msgEl.textContent = '✅ Joined! Your class stream and tasks are now available.'; msgEl.style.color = 'var(--green)'; if (typeof _pushNotif === 'function') _pushNotif('badge','Class joined! 🎉','You now have access to your class stream, tasks and Q&A board'); if (typeof showToast === 'function') showToast('🎉 Class joined successfully!', 'success'); setTimeout(() => { if (typeof showScreen === 'function') showScreen('home'); }, 1500); } else { msgEl.textContent = '⚠️ Could not join — you may already be in this class.'; msgEl.style.color = 'var(--orange)'; } } catch(e) { msgEl.textContent = '❌ Connection error — try again'; msgEl.style.color = 'var(--red)'; } } // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // HOOK NEW SCREENS INTO showScreen // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ const _origShowScreen = typeof window.showScreen === 'function' ? window.showScreen : null; window.showScreen = function(id) { if (_origShowScreen) _origShowScreen(id); if (id === 'messages') { loadStudentMessages(); } if (id === 'class-stream') { loadStudentStream(); } if (id === 'join-code') { /* just shows the form */ } }; // Add Messages + Stream links to home screen notification area (function _injectHomeLinks() { const tryInject = () => { const tasksSection = document.getElementById('home-tasks-section'); if (!tasksSection) { setTimeout(tryInject, 1000); return; } if (document.getElementById('home-quick-links')) return; const wrap = document.createElement('div'); wrap.id = 'home-quick-links'; wrap.style.cssText = 'padding:0 14px 4px;display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap'; wrap.innerHTML = ` `; tasksSection.parentNode.insertBefore(wrap, tasksSection); }; setTimeout(tryInject, 1500); })(); // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // F1 — WEB PUSH NOTIFICATIONS // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ async function requestPushPermission() { if (!('Notification' in window)) { showToast('Push notifications not supported in this browser'); return; } const perm = await Notification.requestPermission(); if (perm === 'granted') { showToast('🔔 Notifications enabled!', 'success'); try { localStorage.setItem('ma_push_enabled', '1'); } catch(e) {} _showLocalNotif('MatricAce', "Notifications are now on! You'll get alerts for new tasks, grades and messages."); } else { showToast('Notifications blocked — enable in browser settings'); } } function _showLocalNotif(title, body, icon) { if (Notification.permission !== 'granted') return; try { new Notification(title, { body, icon: icon || '/favicon.ico', badge: '/favicon.ico' }); } catch(e) {} } // Override _pushNotif to also fire a local notification for important events const _origPushNotif = typeof _pushNotif === 'function' ? _pushNotif : null; window._pushNotif = function(type, title, body) { if (_origPushNotif) _origPushNotif(type, title, body); if (['task','message','announcement'].includes(type)) { _showLocalNotif('MatricAce — ' + title, body); } }; // Show push prompt on first login (function _checkPushPrompt() { const asked = localStorage.getItem('ma_push_asked'); if (!asked && 'Notification' in window && Notification.permission === 'default') { setTimeout(() => { const banner = document.createElement('div'); banner.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;bottom:80px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);z-index:9000;background:var(--bg2);border:1.5px solid var(--border2);border-radius:14px;padding:14px 18px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.3);max-width:340px;width:90%'; banner.innerHTML = `
🔔
Enable notifications?
Get alerts for new tasks, grades and messages.
`; document.body.appendChild(banner); setTimeout(() => banner.remove(), 12000); try { localStorage.setItem('ma_push_asked', '1'); } catch(e) {} }, 5000); } })(); // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // F5 — STUDENT PORTFOLIO / WORK HISTORY // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function loadPortfolio() { const uid = (typeof CURRENT_USER !== 'undefined' && CURRENT_USER) ? CURRENT_USER.uid : null; const el = document.getElementById('portfolio-list'); if (!el) { setTimeout(loadPortfolio, 300); return; } // retry if screen not yet injected let subs = []; try { subs = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('ma_my_submissions_' + uid) || '[]'); } catch(e) {} if (!subs.length) { el.innerHTML = '
📁
No submitted work yet
Submit assignments from My Tasks to build your portfolio
'; return; } const graded = subs.filter(s => s.grade != null); const pending = subs.filter(s => s.grade == null); const avg = graded.length ? Math.round(graded.reduce((a,s)=>a+s.grade,0)/graded.length) : null; const statsEl = document.getElementById('portfolio-stats'); if (statsEl) statsEl.innerHTML = `
${subs.length}
Submitted
${avg != null ? avg+'%' : '—'}
Avg Grade
${pending.length}
Awaiting Grade
`; const typeColors = {homework:'#1B4FD8',classwork:'#059669',test_prep:'#DC2626',revision:'#7C3AED'}; el.innerHTML = subs.sort((a,b)=>new Date(b.submitted_at)-new Date(a.submitted_at)).map(s => { const gradeCol = s.grade==null?'var(--text3)':s.grade>=75?'var(--green)':s.grade>=50?'var(--orange)':'var(--red)'; const ts = s.submitted_at ? new Date(s.submitted_at).toLocaleDateString('en-ZA',{day:'2-digit',month:'short',year:'numeric'}) : '—'; return `
📋
${s.assignment_title||'Assignment'}
📚 ${s.subject||'—'} · 📅 Submitted ${ts}
${s.grade != null ? `
${s.grade}%
${s.feedback ? `
"${s.feedback.slice(0,120)}${s.feedback.length>120?'…':''}"
` : ''}
` : '
⏳ Awaiting grade
'}
`; }).join(''); } // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // F11 — ENHANCED FOCUS MODE (Pomodoro upgrade) // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ let _focusSession = { active:false, subject:'', startTime:null, totalMins:0, interval:null }; function startFocusMode(subject, mins) { if (_focusSession.active) return; _focusSession = { active:true, subject:subject||'Study', startTime:Date.now(), totalMins:mins||25, interval:null }; const overlay = document.createElement('div'); overlay.id = 'focus-overlay'; overlay.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:9500;background:linear-gradient(160deg,#060912,#0a0f1e);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:Manrope,sans-serif'; overlay.innerHTML = `
🎯
Focus Mode
${_focusSession.subject}
${String(mins||25).padStart(2,'0')}:00
+0 XP earned
`; document.body.appendChild(overlay); let elapsed = 0; const totalSecs = (mins||25) * 60; _focusSession.interval = setInterval(() => { elapsed++; const remaining = totalSecs - elapsed; if (remaining <= 0) { endFocusMode(); return; } const m = String(Math.floor(remaining/60)).padStart(2,'0'); const s = String(remaining%60).padStart(2,'0'); const timerEl = document.getElementById('focus-timer'); const progEl = document.getElementById('focus-progress'); const xpEl = document.getElementById('focus-xp-count'); if (timerEl) timerEl.textContent = m+':'+s; if (progEl) progEl.style.width = Math.round(elapsed/totalSecs*100)+'%'; if (xpEl) xpEl.textContent = '+'+Math.floor(elapsed/60)*2+' XP earned'; }, 1000); } function endFocusMode() { if (_focusSession.interval) clearInterval(_focusSession.interval); const mins = Math.floor((Date.now() - _focusSession.startTime) / 60000); const xp = Math.max(mins * 2, 5); const overlay = document.getElementById('focus-overlay'); if (overlay) overlay.remove(); if (typeof awardXP === 'function') awardXP(xp, 'Focus session: ' + _focusSession.subject + ' (' + mins + ' min)'); if (typeof showToast === 'function') showToast('🎯 Focus session complete! +'+xp+' XP earned', 'success'); if (typeof _pushNotif === 'function') _pushNotif('badge', 'Focus session complete!', mins+' minutes of focused study · +'+xp+' XP'); _focusSession.active = false; } // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // F12 — STUDENT WELLNESS CHECK-IN // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function showWellnessCheckin() { if (document.getElementById('wellness-checkin-modal')) return; const modal = document.createElement('div'); modal.id = 'wellness-checkin-modal'; modal.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:9000;background:rgba(0,0,0,.6);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:16px;font-family:Manrope,sans-serif'; let mood=3, confidence=3, note=''; modal.innerHTML = `
❤️
Daily Check-in
30 seconds · Your teacher can see your responses
How are you feeling today?
${['😔','😕','😐','🙂','😄'].map((e,i)=>``).join('')}
Confidence in today's work? (1–5)
3/5
Anything on your mind? (optional)
`; window._wcMood=3; window._wcConf=3; window._wcNote=''; document.body.appendChild(modal); } function submitWellnessCheckin() { const uid = (typeof CURRENT_USER !== 'undefined' && CURRENT_USER) ? CURRENT_USER.uid : null; const sid = CURRENT_USER?.school_id || null; const cid = CURRENT_USER?.class_id || null; const entry = { id:'wc_'+Date.now(), student_uid:uid, student_name:(CURRENT_USER?.name||'Student')+' '+(CURRENT_USER?.surname||''), school_id:sid, class_id:cid, date:new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10), mood:window._wcMood||3, confidence:window._wcConf||3, note:window._wcNote||'', needs_support:(window._wcMood||3)<=2, created_at:new Date().toISOString() }; // Save locally under school+class key for teacher to read if (sid && cid) { try { let entries = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('ma_wellness_'+sid+'_'+cid)||'[]'); entries = entries.filter(e => e.student_uid !== uid || e.date !== entry.date); entries.unshift(entry); localStorage.setItem('ma_wellness_'+sid+'_'+cid, JSON.stringify(entries.slice(0,200))); } catch(e) {} } // Push to Supabase const supaURL = typeof SUPA_URL !== 'undefined' ? SUPA_URL : ''; const supaKey = typeof SUPA_KEY !== 'undefined' ? SUPA_KEY : ''; if (supaURL) fetch(supaURL+'/rest/v1/wellness_checkins',{method:'POST',headers:{'apikey':supaKey,'Authorization':'Bearer '+supaKey,'Content-Type':'application/json','Prefer':'return=minimal'},body:JSON.stringify(entry)}).catch(()=>{}); document.getElementById('wellness-checkin-modal')?.remove(); if (typeof showToast === 'function') showToast("❤️ Check-in saved! Your teacher can see you're doing well.", 'success'); if (typeof awardXP === 'function') awardXP(5, 'Daily wellness check-in'); } // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // PORTFOLIO SCREEN — inject into DOM // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ (function _injectPortfolioScreen() { if (document.getElementById('screen-portfolio')) return; const screen = document.createElement('div'); screen.className = 'screen'; screen.id = 'screen-portfolio'; screen.innerHTML = `
📁 My Portfolio
`; const radar = document.getElementById('screen-radar'); if (radar) radar.parentNode.insertBefore(screen, radar.nextSibling); else document.querySelector('.screens-wrap, body').appendChild(screen); })(); // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // F18 — SERVICE WORKER UPGRADE (offline quiz + tasks cache) // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ (function _upgradeServiceWorker() { if (!('serviceWorker' in navigator)) return; const swCode = ` var CACHE_V = 'matricace-v7'; var QUIZ_CACHE = 'matricace-quiz-v7'; var TASK_CACHE = 'matricace-tasks-v7'; var STATIC = ['/']; self.addEventListener('install', e => { e.waitUntil( caches.open(CACHE_V).then(c => c.addAll(STATIC)).then(() => self.skipWaiting()) ); }); self.addEventListener('activate', e => { e.waitUntil( caches.keys().then(keys => Promise.all(keys.filter(k => k !== CACHE_V && k !== QUIZ_CACHE && k !== TASK_CACHE).map(k => caches.delete(k))) ).then(() => self.clients.claim()) ); }); self.addEventListener('fetch', e => { const url = e.request.url; // Cache quiz API responses if (url.includes('supabase') && url.includes('classwork')) { e.respondWith( fetch(e.request).then(res => { const clone = res.clone(); caches.open(TASK_CACHE).then(c => c.put(e.request, clone)); return res; }).catch(() => caches.match(e.request)) ); return; } // Network-first for API, cache-first for static if (url.includes('supabase') || url.includes('api')) { e.respondWith(fetch(e.request).catch(() => caches.match(e.request))); } else { e.respondWith(caches.match(e.request).then(cached => cached || fetch(e.request).then(res => { if (res.ok) caches.open(CACHE_V).then(c => c.put(e.request, res.clone())); return res; }))); } }); self.addEventListener('message', e => { if (e.data === 'SKIP_WAITING') self.skipWaiting(); }); `; try { const blob = new Blob([swCode], {type:'application/javascript'}); const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob); navigator.serviceWorker.register(url, {scope:'/'}).then(reg => { reg.addEventListener('updatefound', () => { const sw = reg.installing; sw.addEventListener('statechange', () => { if (sw.state==='installed') sw.postMessage('SKIP_WAITING'); }); }); }).catch(() => {}); } catch(e) {} })(); // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // F19 — ACCESSIBILITY (student app) // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function _studentA11y() { // Skip link const skip = document.createElement('a'); skip.href = '#main-app'; skip.textContent = 'Skip to app content'; skip.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;top:-40px;left:0;background:var(--primary);color:#fff;padding:8px 14px;z-index:99999;font-weight:700;font-size:.82rem;text-decoration:none;border-radius:0 0 8px 0;transition:top .2s'; skip.addEventListener('focus', () => skip.style.top = '0'); skip.addEventListener('blur', () => skip.style.top = '-40px'); document.body.prepend(skip); const appEl = document.querySelector('.app-wrap, .screens-wrap, #screen-home')?.parentElement; if (appEl) appEl.id = 'main-app'; // Nav buttons — role + aria document.querySelectorAll('.nav-item, .nav-btn').forEach(el => { el.setAttribute('role', 'button'); el.setAttribute('tabindex', '0'); el.addEventListener('keydown', e => { if (e.key==='Enter'||e.key===' ') { e.preventDefault(); el.click(); } }); }); // Screens — landmark roles document.querySelectorAll('.screen').forEach(s => { s.setAttribute('role', 'region'); const id = s.id?.replace('screen-',''); if (id) s.setAttribute('aria-label', id.replace(/-/g,' ')); }); // Images without alt document.querySelectorAll('img:not([alt])').forEach(img => img.setAttribute('alt', '')); // Buttons without labels document.querySelectorAll('button:not([aria-label])').forEach(btn => { const txt = btn.textContent?.trim(); if (txt && txt.length < 50) btn.setAttribute('aria-label', txt.replace(/[^\w\s]/g,'').trim()); }); }); // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // HOOK NEW SCREENS // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ const _origShowScreen2 = typeof window.showScreen === 'function' ? window.showScreen : null; window.showScreen = function(id) { if (id === 'wellness-checkin') { showWellnessCheckin(); return; } if (_origShowScreen2) _origShowScreen2(id); if (id === 'portfolio') { loadPortfolio(); } }; // Add Portfolio + Wellness to home quick links (function _injectExtraLinks() { const tryInject = () => { const ql = document.getElementById('home-quick-links'); if (!ql || document.getElementById('home-extra-links')) { if (!ql) setTimeout(tryInject, 1200); return; } const wrap = document.createElement('div'); wrap.id = 'home-extra-links'; wrap.style.cssText = 'padding:0 14px 4px;display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap'; wrap.innerHTML = ` `; ql.parentNode.insertBefore(wrap, ql.nextSibling); }; setTimeout(tryInject, 2000); })(); // (new feature functions moved to main script block) // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // FEATURE A: WRITE & SCAN — Camera + AI handwriting grader // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ var _wsImageBase64 = null; var _wsImageMime = 'image/jpeg'; function wsTriggerCapture() { var inp = document.getElementById('ws-file-input'); if (inp) inp.click(); } function wsHandleFile(evt) { var file = evt.target.files[0]; if (!file) return; _wsImageMime = file.type || 'image/jpeg'; var reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = function(e) { _wsImageBase64 = e.target.result.split(',')[1]; var preview = document.getElementById('ws-preview'); var previewWrap = document.getElementById('ws-preview-wrap'); var placeholder = document.getElementById('ws-placeholder'); var captureArea = document.getElementById('ws-capture-area'); var gradeBtn = document.getElementById('ws-grade-btn'); if (preview) preview.src = e.target.result; if (previewWrap) previewWrap.style.display = 'block'; if (placeholder) placeholder.style.display = 'none'; if (captureArea) { captureArea.style.borderStyle = 'solid'; captureArea.style.borderColor = 'var(--green)'; } if (gradeBtn) { gradeBtn.style.opacity = '1'; gradeBtn.style.pointerEvents = 'auto'; } }; reader.readAsDataURL(file); } function wsResetCapture() { _wsImageBase64 = null; _wsImageMime = 'image/jpeg'; var preview = document.getElementById('ws-preview'); var previewWrap = document.getElementById('ws-preview-wrap'); var placeholder = document.getElementById('ws-placeholder'); var captureArea = document.getElementById('ws-capture-area'); var gradeBtn = document.getElementById('ws-grade-btn'); var fileInp = document.getElementById('ws-file-input'); if (preview) preview.src = ''; if (previewWrap) previewWrap.style.display = 'none'; if (placeholder) placeholder.style.display = 'block'; if (captureArea) { captureArea.style.borderStyle = 'dashed'; captureArea.style.borderColor = 'var(--border2)'; } if (gradeBtn) { gradeBtn.style.opacity = '.4'; gradeBtn.style.pointerEvents = 'none'; } if (fileInp) fileInp.value = ''; } async function wsGrade() { if (!_wsImageBase64) return; var subject = (document.getElementById('ws-subject') || {}).value || 'Mathematics'; var question = ((document.getElementById('ws-question') || {}).value || '').trim(); var btn = document.getElementById('ws-grade-btn'); if (btn) { btn.innerHTML = '⏳ Grading your answer...'; btn.style.pointerEvents = 'none'; } var prompt = 'You are a South African matric NSC exam marker for ' + subject + '.\n' + (question ? 'The question asked: ' + question + '\n' : '') + 'The student has submitted a HANDWRITTEN answer as an image. Read the handwriting carefully and mark it.\n\n' + 'Return ONLY a valid JSON object — no markdown fences, no extra text — with these exact fields:\n' + '{"score":0,"max":10,"grade":"A","summary":"2 sentence verdict","correct":["thing done right"],"errors":["specific error"],"tip":"one exam tip","model_answer":"concise correct approach"}'; // AI usage cap if (!STATE.isPremium) { var _q = aiGetQuota(); if (_q.used >= _q.limit) { showPremiumUpsell('Write & Scan', 'You\'ve used your ' + _q.limit + ' free AI messages today. Upgrade to Premium for more.'); if (btn) { btn.innerHTML = '🤖 Grade My Answer'; btn.style.pointerEvents = 'auto'; btn.style.opacity = '1'; } return; } aiUseQuota(); } try { var res = await fetch(ANTHROPIC_PROXY, { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + SUPA_ANON_KEY, 'x-anthropic-beta': 'prompt-caching-2024-07-31' }, body: JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', max_tokens: 1000, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: [ { type: 'image', source: { type: 'base64', media_type: _wsImageMime || 'image/jpeg', data: _wsImageBase64 } }, { type: 'text', text: prompt } ] }] }) }); var data = await res.json(); var raw = (data.content || []).map(function(b){ return b.text || ''; }).join(''); var clean = raw.replace(/```json|```/g, '').trim(); var parsed = JSON.parse(clean); wsShowResult(parsed); } catch(e) { if (typeof showToast === 'function') showToast('Grading failed — check connection', 'error'); if (btn) { btn.innerHTML = '🤖 Grade My Answer'; btn.style.pointerEvents = 'auto'; } } } function wsShowResult(r) { var gradeColors = { A:'#059669', B:'#10b981', C:'#f59e0b', D:'#f97316', E:'#ef4444', F:'#dc2626' }; var gc = gradeColors[r.grade] || 'var(--text)'; var pct = Math.round((r.score / r.max) * 100); var scoreEl = document.getElementById('ws-score-card'); if (scoreEl) { scoreEl.innerHTML = '
' + r.grade + '
' + '
' + r.score + ' / ' + r.max + ' (' + pct + '%)
' + '
' + (r.summary || '') + '
'; } var fb = ''; if (r.correct && r.correct.length) { fb += '
✓ What you did right
'; r.correct.forEach(function(c){ fb += '
' + c + '
'; }); } if (r.errors && r.errors.length) { fb += '
✗ Errors to fix
'; r.errors.forEach(function(e){ fb += '
' + e + '
'; }); } if (r.model_answer) { fb += '
📝 Model Approach
' + '
' + r.model_answer + '
'; } if (r.tip) { fb += '
' + '
💡 EXAM TIP
' + '
' + r.tip + '
'; } var fbEl = document.getElementById('ws-feedback-card'); if (fbEl) fbEl.innerHTML = fb; var step1 = document.getElementById('ws-step1'); var result = document.getElementById('ws-result'); if (step1) step1.style.display = 'none'; if (result) { result.style.display = 'flex'; } } function wsReset() { wsResetCapture(); var q = document.getElementById('ws-question'); var step1 = document.getElementById('ws-step1'); var result = document.getElementById('ws-result'); var btn = document.getElementById('ws-grade-btn'); if (q) q.value = ''; if (step1) step1.style.display = 'flex'; if (result) result.style.display = 'none'; if (btn) btn.innerHTML = '🤖 Grade My Answer'; } // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // FEATURE B: OFFLINE DOWNLOADS — Cache API storage for no-data study // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ var OFFLINE_CACHE_NAME = 'matricace-offline-v1'; function showOfflineManager() { var existing = document.getElementById('offline-manager-modal'); if (existing) existing.remove(); var modal = document.createElement('div'); modal.id = 'offline-manager-modal'; modal.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:4000;background:var(--bg);display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden'; modal.innerHTML = '
' + '' + '
📥 Offline Downloads
Study anywhere without data
' + '
' + '
' + '
Checking saved content…
'; document.body.appendChild(modal); offlineRenderList(); offlineUpdateStorageInfo(); } async function offlineRenderList() { var list = document.getElementById('offline-list'); if (!list) return; var subjects = ['Mathematics','Physical Sciences','Life Sciences','Geography','History','Accounting','Business Studies','Economics','English HL','Mathematics Literacy']; var icons = {'Mathematics':'📐','Physical Sciences':'⚗','Life Sciences':'🧬','Geography':'🌍','History':'📜','Accounting':'🧾','Business Studies':'💼','Economics':'📈','English HL':'📖','Mathematics Literacy':'🔢'}; var cached = {}; try { var cache = await caches.open(OFFLINE_CACHE_NAME); var keys = await cache.keys(); keys.forEach(function(req) { subjects.forEach(function(s) { var k = s.replace(/\s+/g,'-').toLowerCase(); if (req.url.indexOf('offline-fc-' + k) >= 0) { cached[s] = cached[s] || {}; cached[s].fc = true; } if (req.url.indexOf('offline-qbank-' + k) >= 0) { cached[s] = cached[s] || {}; cached[s].qb = true; } }); }); } catch(e) {} var html = '
' + '📡 Saved content works without internet. Each subject saves its flashcards and question bank to your device.
'; subjects.forEach(function(s) { var isCached = !!(cached[s] && (cached[s].fc || cached[s].qb)); var deckCount = (typeof FLASHCARD_DECKS !== 'undefined' && FLASHCARD_DECKS[s]) ? FLASHCARD_DECKS[s].length : 0; var qCount = 0; if (typeof getMCQBank === 'function') { var b = getMCQBank(s); qCount = b ? b.length : 0; } var safeS = s.replace(/'/g, "\'"); html += '
' + '
' + '' + (icons[s] || '📄') + '' + '
' + s + '
' + '
' + deckCount + ' flashcards · ' + qCount + ' questions
' + (isCached ? '✓ SAVED' : 'Not saved') + '
' + '
' + '' + '
'; }); list.innerHTML = html; } async function offlineDownloadSubject(subject, btn) { if (btn) { btn.textContent = 'Saving...'; btn.style.pointerEvents = 'none'; } try { var cache = await caches.open(OFFLINE_CACHE_NAME); var k = subject.replace(/\s+/g,'-').toLowerCase(); if (typeof FLASHCARD_DECKS !== 'undefined' && FLASHCARD_DECKS[subject]) { await cache.put('offline-fc-' + k, new Response(JSON.stringify({ subject: subject, cards: FLASHCARD_DECKS[subject], savedAt: new Date().toISOString() }), { headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } })); } if (typeof getMCQBank === 'function') { var bank = getMCQBank(subject); if (bank && bank.length) { await cache.put('offline-qbank-' + k, new Response(JSON.stringify({ subject: subject, questions: bank, savedAt: new Date().toISOString() }), { headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } })); } } if (btn) { btn.textContent = '✓ Saved — Re-download'; btn.style.background = 'var(--green-dim)'; btn.style.color = 'var(--green)'; btn.style.borderColor = 'rgba(5,150,105,.3)'; btn.style.pointerEvents = 'auto'; } if (typeof showToast === 'function') showToast(subject + ' saved for offline use', 'success'); offlineUpdateStorageInfo(); } catch(e) { if (btn) { btn.textContent = 'Save failed — try again'; btn.style.pointerEvents = 'auto'; } } } async function offlineDeleteSubject(subject) { try { var cache = await caches.open(OFFLINE_CACHE_NAME); var k = subject.replace(/\s+/g,'-').toLowerCase(); await cache.delete('offline-fc-' + k); await cache.delete('offline-qbank-' + k); if (typeof showToast === 'function') showToast(subject + ' removed from offline storage'); offlineRenderList(); offlineUpdateStorageInfo(); } catch(e) {} } async function offlineUpdateStorageInfo() { var el = document.getElementById('offline-storage-used'); if (!el || !navigator.storage || !navigator.storage.estimate) return; try { var est = await navigator.storage.estimate(); el.textContent = (est.usage / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(1) + ' MB used'; } catch(e) {} } // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // FEATURE C: LIVE CLASS QUIZ — Host & Student real-time quiz // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ var LQ = { mode:null, sessionCode:null, questions:[], currentQ:0, scores:{}, playerName:null, timerInterval:null, timeLeft:20, answered:false, totalQuestions:5, timePerQ:20 }; var _origShowLiveQuiz = window.showLiveQuiz; window.showLiveQuiz = function() { showScreen('live-quiz'); lqRenderModePicker(); }; function lqSetQCount(n, btn) { if (typeof LQ !== 'undefined') LQ.totalQuestions = n; document.querySelectorAll('.lq-qc').forEach(function(b) { b.style.background = 'var(--bg3)'; b.style.color = 'var(--text2)'; }); btn.style.background = 'var(--primary)'; btn.style.color = '#fff'; } function lqSetTimer(val) { if (typeof LQ !== 'undefined') LQ.timePerQ = +val; var lbl = document.getElementById('lq-tpq-val'); if (lbl) lbl.textContent = val + 's'; } function lqRenderModePicker() { var body = document.getElementById('screen-live-quiz'); if (!body) return; body.innerHTML = '
' + '' + '
⚡ Live Class Quiz
' + '
' + '
⚡
' + '
Real-Time Quiz Battle
' + '
Teacher hosts · students compete live
' + '
' + '
🎓
Host a Quiz
' + '
Create session · share code · see live scores
' + '
' + '
👋
Join a Quiz
' + '
Enter the code your teacher shared
'; } function lqStartHost() { var code = Math.random().toString(36).substring(2,7).toUpperCase(); LQ.mode = 'host'; LQ.sessionCode = code; LQ.scores = {}; LQ.currentQ = 0; LQ.totalQuestions = 5; var body = document.getElementById('screen-live-quiz'); body.innerHTML = '
' + '' + '
⚡ Host — Code: ' + code + '
' + '
' + '
' + '
Share with students
' + '
' + code + '
' + '
Tools → Live Class Quiz → Join
' + '
' + '
Settings
' + '
Subject
' + '
' + '
Questions
' + '
' + + [5,10,15,20].map(function(n){ return ''; }).join('') + '
' + '
Seconds per question: 20s
' + '
' + '
' + '
Live Players
0 joined
' + '
Waiting for players…
' + '
'; lqHostPollPlayers(); } function lqHostPollPlayers() { var poll = setInterval(async function() { if (!document.getElementById('lq-scoreboard')) { clearInterval(poll); return; } var players = []; // Try Supabase first if (typeof SB !== 'undefined' && SB) { try { var r = await SB.from('live_sessions').select('players').eq('code', LQ.sessionCode).maybeSingle(); if (!r.error && r.data?.players) { players = r.data.players; } } catch(e) {} } if (!players.length) { try { players = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('lq_players_' + LQ.sessionCode) || '[]'); } catch(e) {} } var sb = document.getElementById('lq-scoreboard'); var pc = document.getElementById('lq-player-count'); if (!sb) { clearInterval(poll); return; } if (pc) pc.textContent = players.length + ' joined'; sb.innerHTML = players.length ? players.map(function(p,i){ return '
'+(i+1)+'.'+p.name+''+(LQ.scores[p.name]||0)+' pts
'; }).join('') : 'Waiting for players…'; }, 1500); } async function lqHostStart() { var subject = (document.getElementById('lq-host-subject') || {}).value || 'Mathematics'; var bank = (typeof getMCQBank === 'function') ? getMCQBank(subject) : null; if (!bank || !bank.length) { if (typeof showToast === 'function') showToast('No questions for ' + subject, 'error'); return; } var shuffled = bank.slice().sort(function(){ return Math.random() - .5; }); LQ.questions = shuffled.slice(0, Math.min(LQ.totalQuestions || 5, shuffled.length)); LQ.currentQ = 0; var sessionData = { subject: subject, questions: LQ.questions, started: true, currentQ: 0, tpq: LQ.timePerQ || 20 }; try { localStorage.setItem('lq_session_' + LQ.sessionCode, JSON.stringify(sessionData)); } catch(e) {} // Persist session to Supabase so students on other devices can join if (typeof SB !== 'undefined' && SB) { SB.from('live_sessions').upsert({ code: LQ.sessionCode, host_uid: (typeof CURRENT_USER !== 'undefined' && CURRENT_USER) ? CURRENT_USER.uid : null, data: sessionData, players: [], created_at: new Date().toISOString(), expires_at: new Date(Date.now() + 3600000).toISOString() }).catch(function(e) { console.warn('[MatricAce] Live session save failed:', e); }); } lqHostShowQuestion(); } function lqHostShowQuestion() { var q = LQ.questions[LQ.currentQ]; if (!q) { lqHostFinalScores(); return; } var colors = ['#ef4444','#3b82f6','#10b981','#f59e0b']; var body = document.getElementById('screen-live-quiz'); body.innerHTML = '
' + '
Q' + (LQ.currentQ+1) + '/' + LQ.questions.length + '
' + '
' + '
' + '
' + '
QUESTION ' + (LQ.currentQ+1) + '
' + '
' + q.q + '
' + '
' + q.opts.map(function(opt,i){ return '
'+['A','B','C','D'][i]+'. '+opt+'
'; }).join('') + '
' + '
' + '' + '
'; try { var s = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('lq_session_' + LQ.sessionCode)||'{}'); s.currentQ = LQ.currentQ; localStorage.setItem('lq_session_' + LQ.sessionCode, JSON.stringify(s)); } catch(e) {} if (typeof SB !== 'undefined' && SB) { SB.from('live_sessions').update({ data: { currentQ: LQ.currentQ } }).eq('code', LQ.sessionCode).catch(function(){}); } var t = LQ.timePerQ || 20; if (document.getElementById('lq-host-timer')) document.getElementById('lq-host-timer').textContent = t + 's'; if (LQ.timerInterval) clearInterval(LQ.timerInterval); LQ.timerInterval = setInterval(function() { t--; var el = document.getElementById('lq-host-timer'); if (!el) { clearInterval(LQ.timerInterval); return; } el.textContent = t + 's'; if (t <= 5) el.style.color = 'var(--red)'; if (t <= 0) { clearInterval(LQ.timerInterval); lqHostReveal(); } }, 1000); } function lqHostReveal() { if (LQ.timerInterval) clearInterval(LQ.timerInterval); var q = LQ.questions[LQ.currentQ]; if (!q) return; var colors = ['#ef4444','#3b82f6','#10b981','#f59e0b']; var body = document.getElementById('screen-live-quiz'); body.innerHTML = '
' + '
✓ Answer Revealed
' + '
' + '
' + '
' + q.q + '
' + '
' + q.opts.map(function(opt,i){ var ok = i===q.correct; return '
'+['A','B','C','D'][i]+'. '+opt+(ok?' ✓':'')+'
'; }).join('') + '
' + (q.exp ? '
💡 ' + q.exp + '
' : '') + '
' + '
'; } async function lqHostFinalScores() { var players = []; if (typeof SB !== 'undefined' && SB) { try { var fr = await SB.from('live_sessions').select('players').eq('code', LQ.sessionCode).maybeSingle(); if (!fr.error && fr.data?.players) players = fr.data.players; } catch(e) {} } if (!players.length) { try { players = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('lq_players_' + LQ.sessionCode) || '[]'); } catch(e) {} } // Merge in stored scores try { var s = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('lq_session_' + LQ.sessionCode)||'{}'); if (s.scores) { players.forEach(function(p){ LQ.scores[p.name] = s.scores[p.name] || LQ.scores[p.name] || 0; }); } } catch(e) {} players.sort(function(a,b){ return (LQ.scores[b.name]||0)-(LQ.scores[a.name]||0); }); var medals = ['🏉','🥈','🥉']; var body = document.getElementById('screen-live-quiz'); body.innerHTML = '
' + '
🏆 Final Scores
' + '
' + '
🏆
' + '
Quiz Complete!
' + '
' + LQ.questions.length + ' questions · Session ' + LQ.sessionCode + '
' + '
' + (players.length ? players.map(function(p,i){ return '
'+(medals[i]||'#'+(i+1))+''+p.name+''+(LQ.scores[p.name]||0)+' pts
'; }).join('') : '
No players joined this session.
') + '
' + '
'; } function lqJoinFlow() { var body = document.getElementById('screen-live-quiz'); body.innerHTML = '
' + '' + '
Join a Quiz
' + '
' + '
' + '
Your Name
' + '
' + '
Session Code
' + '
' + '
'; } async function lqDoJoin() { var name = ((document.getElementById('lq-player-name')||{}).value||'').trim(); var code = ((document.getElementById('lq-join-code')||{}).value||'').trim().toUpperCase(); if (!name) { if (typeof showToast === 'function') showToast('Enter your name', 'error'); return; } if (code.length < 4) { if (typeof showToast === 'function') showToast('Enter the session code', 'error'); return; } var sess = null; // Try Supabase first (cross-device) if (typeof SB !== 'undefined' && SB) { try { var r = await SB.from('live_sessions').select('data,players').eq('code', code).maybeSingle(); if (!r.error && r.data?.data) { sess = r.data.data; // Register player in Supabase var pl = r.data.players || []; if (!pl.find(function(p){return p.name===name;})) { pl.push({name:name, joined_at:new Date().toISOString()}); } await SB.from('live_sessions').update({ players: pl }).eq('code', code).catch(function(){}); try { localStorage.setItem('lq_session_' + code, JSON.stringify(sess)); } catch(e) {} } } catch(e) {} } // Fallback to localStorage if (!sess) { try { sess = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('lq_session_' + code) || 'null'); } catch(e) {} } if (!sess) { if (typeof showToast === 'function') showToast('Session not found — check the code', 'error'); return; } LQ.mode = 'student'; LQ.sessionCode = code; LQ.playerName = name; LQ.answered = false; try { var pl2 = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('lq_players_' + code)||'[]'); if (!pl2.find(function(p){return p.name===name;})) pl2.push({name:name}); localStorage.setItem('lq_players_'+code, JSON.stringify(pl2)); } catch(e) {} lqStudentWait(sess); } function lqStudentWait(sess) { var body = document.getElementById('screen-live-quiz'); body.innerHTML = '
' + '
⚡
' + '
You're in! Hi ' + LQ.playerName + '
' + '
Waiting for teacher to start the quiz…
' + '
Code: ' + LQ.sessionCode + '
'; var poll = setInterval(async function() { var s = null; // Prefer Supabase for real-time updates if (typeof SB !== 'undefined' && SB) { try { var r = await SB.from('live_sessions').select('data').eq('code', LQ.sessionCode).maybeSingle(); if (!r.error && r.data?.data) { s = r.data.data; } } catch(e) {} } if (!s) { try { s = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('lq_session_' + LQ.sessionCode)||'null'); } catch(e) {} } if (s && s.started && s.questions && s.questions.length) { clearInterval(poll); LQ.questions = s.questions; LQ.currentQ = s.currentQ||0; lqStudentShowQ(); } }, 1500); } async function lqStudentShowQ() { var sess = null; try { sess = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('lq_session_' + LQ.sessionCode)||'null'); } catch(e) {} if (sess) LQ.currentQ = sess.currentQ || LQ.currentQ; var q = LQ.questions[LQ.currentQ]; if (!q) { lqStudentDone(); return; } LQ.answered = false; var colors = ['#ef4444','#3b82f6','#10b981','#f59e0b']; var body = document.getElementById('screen-live-quiz'); body.innerHTML = '
' + '
Q' + (LQ.currentQ+1) + '/' + LQ.questions.length + '
' + '
' + '
' + '
' + q.q + '
' + '
' + q.opts.map(function(opt,i){ return ''; }).join('') + '
'; LQ.timeLeft = (sess && sess.tpq) ? sess.tpq : 20; if (document.getElementById('lq-stu-timer')) document.getElementById('lq-stu-timer').textContent = LQ.timeLeft + 's'; if (LQ.timerInterval) clearInterval(LQ.timerInterval); LQ.timerInterval = setInterval(function() { LQ.timeLeft--; var el = document.getElementById('lq-stu-timer'); if (!el) { clearInterval(LQ.timerInterval); return; } el.textContent = LQ.timeLeft + 's'; if (LQ.timeLeft <= 5) el.style.color = 'var(--red)'; if (LQ.timeLeft <= 0) { clearInterval(LQ.timerInterval); if (!LQ.answered) { LQ.answered=true; document.querySelectorAll('#lq-stu-opts button').forEach(function(b){b.style.pointerEvents='none';b.style.opacity='.5';}); if (typeof showToast==='function') showToast('⏰ Time up!','error'); } } }, 1000); var lastQ = LQ.currentQ; var qpoll = setInterval(async function() { var s2 = null; if (typeof SB !== 'undefined' && SB) { try { var r2 = await SB.from('live_sessions').select('data').eq('code', LQ.sessionCode).maybeSingle(); if (!r2.error && r2.data?.data) s2 = r2.data.data; } catch(e) {} } if (!s2) { try { s2 = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('lq_session_'+LQ.sessionCode)||'null'); } catch(e) {} } if (s2 && s2.currentQ !== undefined && s2.currentQ !== lastQ) { clearInterval(qpoll); clearInterval(LQ.timerInterval); LQ.currentQ = s2.currentQ; if (LQ.currentQ >= LQ.questions.length) lqStudentDone(); else lqStudentShowQ(); } }, 800); } function lqStudentAnswer(idx, btn) { if (LQ.answered) return; LQ.answered = true; clearInterval(LQ.timerInterval); var q = LQ.questions[LQ.currentQ]; var isCorrect = idx === q.correct; var colors = ['#ef4444','#3b82f6','#10b981','#f59e0b']; document.querySelectorAll('#lq-stu-opts button').forEach(function(b,i) { b.style.pointerEvents = 'none'; if (i === q.correct) { b.style.background = 'rgba(5,150,105,.25)'; b.style.borderColor = 'var(--green)'; } else if (i === idx && !isCorrect) { b.style.background = 'rgba(220,38,38,.2)'; b.style.borderColor = 'var(--red)'; } else b.style.opacity = '.4'; }); if (isCorrect) { if (typeof showToast === 'function') showToast('✓ Correct! +100 pts', 'success'); try { var s=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('lq_session_'+LQ.sessionCode)||'{}'); s.scores=s.scores||{}; s.scores[LQ.playerName]=(s.scores[LQ.playerName]||0)+100; localStorage.setItem('lq_session_'+LQ.sessionCode,JSON.stringify(s)); } catch(e) {} } else { if (typeof showToast === 'function') showToast('✗ Incorrect', 'error'); } } function lqStudentDone() { var myScore = 0; try { var s=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('lq_session_'+LQ.sessionCode)||'{}'); myScore=(s.scores&&s.scores[LQ.playerName])||0; } catch(e) {} var pct = LQ.questions.length ? Math.round((myScore/(LQ.questions.length*100))*100) : 0; var body = document.getElementById('screen-live-quiz'); body.innerHTML = '
' + '
' + (pct>=80?'🏆':pct>=50?'👍':'📚') + '
' + '
Quiz Complete!
' + '
' + myScore + ' pts
' + '
' + pct + '% accuracy · ' + LQ.questions.length + ' questions
' + '
' + (pct>=80 ? '🔥 Excellent work! You dominated that quiz.' : pct>=60 ? '👏 Good effort! Review the questions you missed.' : '📖 Keep practising — check the study guides for these topics.') + '
' + '
'; } // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // FEATURE D: ADAPTIVE SPACED REPETITION (SM-2) // ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ var SRS_KEY = 'ma_srs_v1'; function srsLoad() { try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(SRS_KEY)||'{}'); } catch(e) { return {}; } } function srsSave(d) { try { localStorage.setItem(SRS_KEY, JSON.stringify(d)); } catch(e) {} } function srsCardKey(subject, idx) { return subject.replace(/\s+/g,'_')+'__'+idx; } function sm2(ef, quality, interval, reps) { var newEF = Math.max(1.3, ef + (0.1 - (5-quality)*(0.08 + (5-quality)*0.02))); var newInterval, newReps; if (quality < 3) { newInterval = 1; newReps = 0; } else { newReps = reps+1; newInterval = reps===0 ? 1 : reps===1 ? 6 : Math.round(interval*newEF); } return { ef: newEF, interval: newInterval, repetitions: newReps, nextDue: Date.now() + newInterval*86400000 }; } function srsDueCount(subject) { var data = srsLoad(); var deck = typeof FLASHCARD_DECKS!=='undefined' && FLASHCARD_DECKS[subject]; if (!deck) return 0; var now = Date.now(); var due = 0; deck.forEach(function(c,i){ var k=srsCardKey(subject,i); var r=data[k]; if(!r||r.nextDue<=now) due++; }); return due; } function srsGetDueCards(subject) { var data = srsLoad(); var deck = typeof FLASHCARD_DECKS!=='undefined' && FLASHCARD_DECKS[subject]; if (!deck) return []; var now = Date.now(); var due = []; deck.forEach(function(card,idx){ var k=srsCardKey(subject,idx); var c=data[k]; if(!c||c.nextDue<=now) due.push({card:card,idx:idx,srs:c||{ef:2.5,interval:1,repetitions:0,nextDue:0}}); }); return due; } function srsRecordRating(subject, idx, quality) { var data = srsLoad(); var k = srsCardKey(subject,idx); var c = data[k]||{ef:2.5,interval:1,repetitions:0,nextDue:0}; data[k] = sm2(c.ef, quality, c.interval, c.repetitions); srsSave(data); } var _origRateCard = window.rateCard; window.rateCard = function(rating) { if (typeof FC === 'undefined' || typeof FLASHCARD_DECKS === 'undefined') { if(_origRateCard) _origRateCard(rating); return; } var subject = FC.subject; var deck = FLASHCARD_DECKS[subject]; if (!deck) { if(_origRateCard) _origRateCard(rating); return; } var quality = rating==='good' ? 5 : rating==='hard' ? 3 : 1; srsRecordRating(subject, FC.index % deck.length, quality); if (rating==='good') { FC.known++; if(typeof showToast==='function') showToast('Mastered! Scheduled for later review.'); } else if (rating==='hard') { FC.review++; if(typeof showToast==='function') showToast('Due again tomorrow.'); } else { FC.again++; if(typeof showToast==='function') showToast('Added to review pile.'); } var due = srsGetDueCards(subject); var next = due.find(function(d){ return d.idx !== FC.index % deck.length; }); if (next) FC.index = next.idx; else if (due.length===0) { if(typeof showToast==='function') showToast('All caught up! Come back tomorrow.','success'); FC.index=0; setTimeout(function(){ if(typeof updateFCStats==='function') updateFCStats(); if(typeof loadFlashcard==='function') loadFlashcard(); updateSRSDueBadge(subject); },1200); return; } else FC.index = due[0].idx; if(typeof updateFCStats==='function') updateFCStats(); if(typeof loadFlashcard==='function') loadFlashcard(); updateSRSDueBadge(subject); }; function updateSRSDueBadge(subject) { var s = subject || (typeof FC!=='undefined' && FC.subject) || 'Life Sciences'; var due = srsDueCount(s); var el = document.getElementById('fc-srs-due'); if (el) { el.textContent = due + ' due today'; el.style.display = due > 0 ? 'inline' : 'none'; } } function srsStartDueSession() { if (typeof FC==='undefined') return; var subject = FC.subject; var due = srsGetDueCards(subject); if (!due.length) { if(typeof showToast==='function') showToast('All caught up for today!','success'); return; } FC.index = due[0].idx; FC.known=0; FC.review=0; FC.again=0; if(typeof loadFlashcard==='function') loadFlashcard(); if(typeof updateFCStats==='function') updateFCStats(); if(typeof showToast==='function') showToast('Studying ' + due.length + ' due card' + (due.length>1?'s':'') + ' for ' + subject); } // Inject SRS bar into flashcard screen after load (function() { var tryInject = function() { var fcScreen = document.getElementById('screen-flashcards'); if (!fcScreen || document.getElementById('fc-srs-bar')) return; var bar = document.createElement('div'); bar.id = 'fc-srs-bar'; bar.style.cssText = 'display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px 14px;background:var(--bg2);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)'; bar.innerHTML = '🧠 SPACED REPETITION' + '' + '' + ''; var first = fcScreen.firstElementChild; if (first) fcScreen.insertBefore(bar, first.nextSibling || first); if (typeof FC !== 'undefined') updateSRSDueBadge(FC.subject); }; setTimeout(tryInject, 2000); var _origSS = window.showScreen; if (typeof _origSS === 'function') window.showScreen = function(id) { _origSS(id); if (id==='flashcards') setTimeout(function(){ if(typeof FC!=='undefined') updateSRSDueBadge(FC.subject); }, 200); }; })(); // flwResubscribe fix function flwResubscribe() { if (typeof flwOpenCheckout === 'function') flwOpenCheckout(); }
